channel.title: Tom Sachs Store
channel.description: Latest drops from the Tom Sachs Store

item.title: No Skateboarding Skateboard Deck
item.description: $150.00 — Skateboarding is still not a crime... it's an Olympic sport. Two side screen printed medium concave shape ½” thick 7 ply Canadian maple plywood skate deck. Size: 8.25” Wide and 31.875” long Made in USA. *Griptape cutout template file included with purchase. File will automatically download once order is confirmed* Deck only. ﻿Griptape, trucks, wheels, and hardware not included.

item.title: Black Porcelain Bead
item.description: $750.00 — English porcelain bead set with a 0.03ct diamond strung on nylon paracord. Nylon paracord has a 3 inch wide opening. S/N: 2023.410Edition of 15 Hand signed muslin pouch.

item.title: Mushroom Sticker
item.description: $1.00 — Why keep the mushroom emoji only in your phone? Graphic originally from: Mushroom Emoji painting, 2023 Acrylic on canvas30" H x 30" W x 1.5" D S/N: 2023.379 High quality silkscreen die-cut vinyl sticker. Weatherproof (UV and water-resistant) Measures 2.5” x 2.5”

item.title: Tom Sachs: Chawan Zine
item.description: $35.00 — Published on the occasion of: Tom Sachs: ChawanApril 15 — May 13, 2023Tomio Koyama Gallerycomplex665 2F, 6-5-24, Roppongi,Minato-ku, Tokyo, JapanPublication © 2023All artwork © Tom Sachs Design by Tom Sachs and Daniel Kyungjae LeeEdited by Daniel Kyungjae LeePhotography by Genevieve Hanson, Tomio Koyama Gallery, and Tom Sachs 8.5 H x 5.5 W inches62 color pages Printed and bound by Bestype NYC285 W Broadway, New York, NY 10013 ISBN: 978-1-955019-07-1S/N: 2023.424200 color copies

item.title: White Porcelain Bead
item.description: $750.00 — English porcelain bead set with a 0.03ct diamond strung on nylon paracord. Nylon paracord has a 3 inch wide opening. S/N: 2023.411 Edition of 15 Hand signed muslin pouch.

item.title: Ten Bullets Sticker (Large)
item.description: $2.00 — Spread the word. In order to purchase this plain Ten Bullets sticker, you must have seen the movie. Measures 4.25" W x 1.38" H Watch Ten Bullets at tenbullets.com

item.title: Rocket Factory NFT NYC Short Sleeve Tee
item.description: $25.00 — Tom Sachs: Rocket Factory NFT NYC 2023 POAP T-Shirt Material: 100% cotton Available sizes: XS, S, M, L, XL or XXL Printed in Brooklyn, NY by LQQK Studio. Learn more at tomsachsrocketfactory.com

item.title: Rocket Factory Sticker
item.description: $2.00 — A sticker of the official logo of the Tom Sachs: Rocket Factory. Full Tom Sachs: Rocket Factory Shop coming soon. Material: Vinyl Dimensions: 3" H x 2.36" W Learn more at tomsachsrocketfactory.com

item.title: Rocket Factory Poster
item.description: $50.00 — Poster of the Tom Sachs: Rocket Factory collection. Dimensions: 36" H x 24" WPrint technique: OffsetStock: Sterling Premium Gloss 80# CoverPress Inks: LED UV Fade Resist 4 Color Process + Gloss Aqueous / blank Publication © 2021 All artwork © Tom Sachs This poster will be shipped separately in a high quality cardboard tube with plastic end caps. Unroll the poster and lay flat upon arrival. Learn more at tomsachsrocketfactory.com

item.title: Rocket Factory NFT Paris Short Sleeve Tee
item.description: $25.00 — Tom Sachs: Rocket Factory NFT Paris 2023 POAP T-Shirt Material: 100% cotton Available sizes: XS, S, M, L, XL or XXL Printed in Brooklyn, NY by LQQK Studio. Learn more at tomsachsrocketfactory.com

item.title: Rocket Factory Uniform T-Shirt
item.description: $50.00 — The official uniform t-shirt of the Tom Sachs Rocket Factory. Full Tom Sachs: Rocket Factory Shop coming soon. Material: 100% cotton Available sizes: XS, S, M, L, XL and XXL Printed by LQQK Studio in Brooklyn, NY. Learn more at tomsachsrocketfactory.com

item.title: Rocket Factory Uniform Hat
item.description: $85.00 — The official hat of the Tom Sachs Rocket Factory. Constructed from a 60% Cotton / 40% Polyester twill fabric. Elasticated shock cord closure secured by brass grommets to prevent pull outs. Embroidered logo on the front panel and Tom Sachs: Rocket Factory patch on the left side panel. Custom made for Tom Sachs: Rocket Factory by WHR. Made in USA Learn more at tomsachsrocketfactory.com

item.title: Rocket Factory Uniform Long Sleeve Tee
item.description: $85.00 — A special edition long sleeve t-shirt with embroidered Tom Sachs Rocket Factory patch on the chest. Material: 100% cotton Available sizes: XS, S, M, L, XL and XXL Printed in Brooklyn, NY by LQQK Studio. Learn more at tomsachsrocketfactory.com

item.title: "Painting" Sticker
item.description: $1.00 — Produced on the occasion of:Tom Sachs: "Painting"January 17 - February 24, 2024Thaddaeus Ropac Paris Marais7 Rue Debelleyme75003 ParisFrance High quality silkscreen die-cut vinyl sticker. Weatherproof (UV and water-resistant) Measures 3” x 3”

item.title: Tom Sachs "Painting" Zine
item.description: $75.00 — Produced on the occasion of:Tom Sachs: "Painting"January 17 - February 24, 2024Thaddaeus Ropac Paris Marais7 Rue Debelleyme75003 ParisFrance Publication © 2024All artwork © Tom SachsEdited by Titus McBeath and Meghan MasiusDesign by Tom SachsPhotography by Genevieve Hanson, Mario Sorrenti, Tom Sachs and Titus McBeath Essay by Dakin Hart 12 H x 9 W inches64 color pages Printed and bound by Bestype285 W BroadwayNew York, NY 10013ISBN#: 978-1-955019-08-8 500 color copies

item.title: "Painting" Tee
item.description: $85.00 — Produced on the occasion of:Tom Sachs: "Painting"January 17 - February 24, 2024Thaddaeus Ropac Paris Marais7 Rue Debelleyme75003 ParisFrance Drawing originally from Scene From Moby Dick, 2023 Acrylic and Krink on canvas 36" x 42" x1.5” S/N: 2023.384 Material: 100% cotton Available sizes: XS, S, M, L, XL or XXL Printed by LQQK Studio in Brooklyn, NY.

item.title: McDonald's Hat
item.description: $85.00 — Constructed from a 60% Cotton / 40% Polyester twill fabric.Elasticated shock cord closure secured by brass grommets to prevent pull outs. Ships with depicted yellow and spare white shock cord bungee. Embroidered logo on the front panel.Custom made for Tom Sachs by WHR.Made in USAS/N: 2022.224 First batch of McDonald's Hats ships in 1-2 weeks. Second batch ships on September 2nd. Disclaimer: Tom Sachs is not affiliated with McDonald's Corporation or its affiliates. All artwork and intellectual pr...

item.title: Tom Sachs: McDonald’s Catalogue Raisonné
item.description: $25.00 — This is a comprehensive, annotated listing of all the known McDonald’s-related artworks created by Tom Sachs Studio over the last 30 years (1994 – 2024). This, like all other Catalogue Raisonnés, is a living document. If you find errors in our documentation, have a piece that is not documented, or have any other questions or comments, please email info@tomsachs.com. Publication © 2024 All artwork © Tom Sachs Design by Tom Sachs and Fili LatinakisEdited by Fili LatinakisPhotography by Genevieve H...

item.title: "Le Tempt" Tee (LIMITIED STOCK)
item.description: $85.00 — Mark Gonzales and Tom Sachs designed a skateboard that was their answer to the pennyboard. A transporter with big wheels that go fast. The prototype, "Le Tempt", was last seen in Deichtorhallen, Hamburg April 2022 at Space Program: Rare Earths. It’s since gone missing. Proceeds from the sale of this t-shirt and zine will go to those providing information leading to the recovery of this stolen skateboard. To provide information reach out to info@tomsachs.com. Material: 100% cotton Available sizes...

item.title: Tom Sachs Bronze
item.description: $50.00 — Published on the occasion of:Tom Sachs BronzeNovember 7 - December 13, 2024Acquavella Galleries18 E 79th StNew York, NY 10075 Creative Direction and Design by Yeju ChoiArtwork Photography by Genevieve Hanson Essay by Christine Poggi104 Pages Printed by O.G.M Printing, Padua, Italy ISBN 978-0-9998457-8-3

item.title: NikeCraft: General Purpose Shoe
item.description: $109.99 — Your sneakers should not be the most exciting thing about you. They are tools. They do their job so you can do yours. It took us 10 years to make a sneaker this simple, as simple as can be and no simpler. The NikeCraft General Purpose Shoe is the new uniform for the Tom Sachs Studio team. It could be your uniform too. The NikeCraft General Purpose Shoe features: Exclusive Studio colorway Durable knitted upper material (open enough to breath, tight enough to ward off a few raindrops) 3-piece mold...

item.title: Tom Sachs J. Chair by Helinox
item.description: $650.00 — The Tom Sachs J.Chair by Helinox is now available for a limited 72-hour pre-order at helinox.com.The chair will only be available until Monday, 6/16, 3PM EST. The chair is made from raw aluminium, natural-rubber Vibram boots, and silkscreen-printed X-Pac fabric. Each chair is made to order and comes with a personalized engraving and unique serial number.Get an exclusive first look in person and pre-order the J.Chair at Tom Sachs Space Program: Infinity at Dongdaemun Design Plaza in Seoul, South ...

item.title: Space Program: Infinity – Experience Report "Astrobiology" Zine
item.description: $25.00 — Printed on the occasion of: Space Program: InfinityApril 25th - September 7, 2025Dongdaemun Design Plaza Exhibition Hall 1,281 Eulji-Ro, Jung-GuSeoul, South Korea Publication © 2025All artwork © Tom SachsDesign by Tom Sachs and Fili LatinakisEdited by Fili Latinkais and Hyungju LeePhotography by Joshua White, Alex Wales, Genevieve Hanson, Fili Latinakis, Hyungju Lee, Gangryu, Mi Park, David Kim 11 H x 8.5W inches34 color pages Printed and bound by Bestype285 W BroadwayNew York, NY 10013ISBN#: 97...

item.title: Tom Sachs Guide
item.description: $89.95 — The Definitive Tom Sachs Guide• 654 color images covering work from 1990–2025• 23 new essays• 7.2 × 10 × 1.3 in. travel size• 2.9 lb.• Sturdy PVC coverTopics include• Explorations in time and space• Ritual• McDonald's• Tea ceremony• Sculpture• How to build a world• Sympathetic magic• Bricolage• Surveillance• Systems of power• Shoes and industrial design• And much more ... by Tom Sachs, Yeju Choi and Howie KahnPhaidonISBN: 978 1 83866 510 4

item.title: Tom Sachs "Painting" (Volume II) Zine
item.description: $75.00 — Produced on the occasion of:Tom Sachs: "Painting" (Volume II)September 7 - October 10, 2024Thaddaeus Ropac Paris Marais7 Rue Debelleyme75003 ParisFrance Publication © 2024All artwork © Tom SachsDesigned by Tom Sachs and Titus McBeathEdited by Titus McBeath and Stephen LauPhotography by Genevieve Hanson, Mario Sorrenti and Titus McBeath Essay by Naomi Fry 12 H x 9 W inches60 color pages Printed and bound by Bestype285 W BroadwayNew York, NY 10013ISBN#: 978-1-955019-02-6 500 color copies

item.title: I.S.R.U. Sticker
item.description: $1.00 — Easy to peel vinyl.Dimensions: 2.5 x .96in S/N: 2026.022 Want one for free? Send a stamped, self-addressed envelope at your own risk to:NikeCraft I.S.R.U350 Canal StreetPO Box 1017New York, NY 10013 Note you are relying on USPS twice. Proceed at your own risk.

item.title: NikeCraft Pre-Order: General Purpose Participation Shoe
item.description: $0.00 — The NikeCraft General Purpose Participation Shoe. Available only to I.S.R.U. campers who lost. If you were allocated the Mars Yard 3.0 you are not eligible for this offer. Pre Order now. Offer ends October 3, 2025. Your payment will be processed now, your shoes will ship in Summer 2026. The Nikecraft General Purpose Participation Shoe features: Exclusive I.S.R.U Studio colorway Durable knitted upper material (open enough to breath, tight enough to ward off a few raindrops) 3-piece molded cup sol...

item.title: NikeCraft: Mars Yard 3.0
item.description: $275.00 — At a glance, nothing about the Mars Yard 3.0 has changed from the previous iteration. But while this shoe looks like earlier Mars Yard footwear, it couldn’t be more different. Every single thing is completely new. The NikeCraft Mars Yard 3.0 features: Oversize 5mm eyelets Staggered eyestay "Blucher" open eyestay TPU Toecap 90 durometer Staggered eyestay 4mm round ribbed polyesther laces Lace keeper Silkscreen printed swoosh Nylon donning strap TPU heel clip 90 durometer Carbon fiber plate Polyur...

item.title: Tom Sachs "A Good Shelf" Zine
item.description: $50.00 — Printed on the occasion of: Tom Sachs: "A Good Shelf"October 14 - December 20,2025 Thaddaeus Ropac LondonEly House, 37 Dover St, London W1S 4NJ, United Kingdom tomsachs.com Publication © 2025 All Artwork © Tom Sachs Designed by Tom Sachs and Titus McBeathEdited by Howie Kahn and Jemima TerryInterview by Tom MarlowPhotography by Genevieve Hanson, and Titus McBeath Printed and bound by Bestype in NYC All rights reserved. No part of the publication may be reprinted or reproduced in any form, or by ...

item.title: Levis® Tom Sachs 1947, 501® Jean
item.description: $450.00 — Good jeans are hard to find. Great ones last forever. These are a reimagining of a Levi’s 1947 classic, built for changing times. Each pair comes with: A U.S. dollar screen printed on both sides “Tom Sachs” signature on one side “Made in Japan,” on other side Debossed “T. Sachs” leather back patch Heavy duty denim pocket bags Hidden stash pocket for handcuff key 12oz Kaihara Selvedge Denim Twin needle arcuate on custom back pocket Internal screen printing T. Sachs red tab Reimagined 1947 501® le...

item.title: Tom Sachs Caran d’Ache Mechanical Pencil Model 849™
item.description: $40.00 — Fluo Orange hexagonal aluminium body Flexible clip and push-button made out of metal Includes 0.5mm leads and eraser Made in Switzerland Made on the occasion of:SPACE PROGRAM: INFINITY April 25th - September 7th, 2025Dongdaemun Design Plaza281 Eulji-ro, Jung District,Seoul, South Korea

item.title: Tom Sachs Caran d'Ache Ballpoint Pen Model 849™
item.description: $50.00 — Black ink, fine point White hexagonal Aluminium body Flexible clip and push-button made out of metal Made in Switzerland Made on the occasion of:SPACE PROGRAM: INFINITY April 25th - September 7th, 2025Dongdaemun Design Plaza281 Eulji-ro, Jung District,Seoul, South Korea

item.title: Space Program: Infinity Sticker
item.description: $1.00 — High quality silkscreen die-cut vinyl sticker. Weatherproof (UV and water-resistant) Measures 3 x 3" Produced on the occasion of: SPACE PROGRAM: INFINITY April 25th - September 7th, 2025Dongdaemun Design Plaza281 Eulji-ro, Jung District,Seoul, South Korea

item.title: A Space Program Sticker
item.description: $1.00 — High quality silkscreen die-cut vinyl sticker. Weatherproof (UV and water-resistant) Measures 3 x 3" Produced on the occasion of: A Space Program: Director's Cut (1:07:20), 2025 Watch it on the I.S.R.U. App.

item.title: Tom Sachs: Toothbrush
item.description: $3.00 — The official toothbrush of the Space Program. Made on the occasion of:SPACE PROGRAM: INFINITY April 25th - September 7th, 2025Dongdaemun Design Plaza281 Eulji-ro, Jung District,Seoul, South Korea S/N: 2025.001 Made in China.

item.title: ISRU T-Shirt
item.description: $35.00 — T-Shirt made in El Salvador, screen printed in Brooklyn.Material: 100% cottonS/N: 2025.336All sales are final. Signature required upon delivery.

item.title: Tom Sachs Caran d'Ache Neocolor II Aquarelle
item.description: $35.00 — Including the ten color standards of the studio: 001 White009 Black005 Grey059 Brown161 Light blue150 Sapphire blue220 Grass green010 Yellow050 Flame red070 Scarlet 4 x 5 x 0.5 inches Made in Switzerland

item.title: NikeCraft: General Purpose Shoe (Studio)
item.description: $0.00 — Your sneakers should not be the most exciting thing about you. They are tools. They do their job so you can do yours. It took us 10 years to make a sneaker this simple, as simple as can be and no simpler. The NikeCraft General Purpose Shoe is the uniform for the Tom Sachs Studio team. It could be your uniform too. The NikeCraft General Purpose Shoe features: Exclusive Studio colorway Durable knitted upper material (open enough to breath, tight enough to ward off a few raindrops) 3-piece molded c...

item.title: Tom Sachs Guide Limited Edition
item.description: $350.00 — Transport and store your Tom Sachs Guide in this limited edition bag.It’s lightweight, water-resistant, and... it’s NOT padded. Includes signed copy of the Tom Sachs Guide. Made out of Dyneema, a stronger than steel waterproof and extremely lightweight non-woven composite fabric. The bag has an easy access back compartment to hold your daily essentials, like wallet, keys, phone and charger. Designed to accommodate the Tom Sachs Guide or iPad Pro 11” and an Apple Pencil. Each Bag features: High q...

item.title: Exploding Poncho 2.0
item.description: $230.00 — A fanny pack. From the crosstown traffic of the busy city streets, to sorting your weed in the rain at Glastonbury Festival, this device does it all. Exploding 2-layer waterproof poncho with adjustable head strap. Large utility pocket and adjustable belt. Made in VietnamMaterial: 100% nylonWeight: 12.8 oz (362.8 g) S/N: 2020. 271Nike # DC5152 For donning and stowage instruction watch: Exploding Poncho All sales are final. Signature required upon delivery.

item.title: Furoshiki
item.description: $230.00 — This Japanese wrapping cloth is perfect for improvised shelter, portage needs and protection from the elements. It folds back into its integrated bag. Nylon and aluminum utility strap. Zip up cell phone pocket. Reinforced corner tie-downs and chest snaps. Made of ultra lightweight and stronger-than-steel Vectran. One size. Made in VietnamMaterial: 100% polyethyleneWeight: 3 oz (85.04 grams)S/N: 2021.175Nike # DD 2782 All sales are final. Signature required upon delivery.

item.title: Foul Weather Jacket
item.description: $350.00 — There is no bad weather, only bad clothing. Stay dry in the worst conditions. This heavy duty Gore-Tex jacket features matte non-reflective olive drab polyester shell and 3-layer construction Gore-Tex lining. This hard shell is your first layer of defense against the elements. Two large exterior front pockets. One interior pocket with dividers for tools. Velcro wrist cuffs. Drawstring hood. Interior belt so you can hang the jacket on your waist when it gets too hot. Magnetic wrist pad for small ...

item.title: Foul Weather Trousers
item.description: $300.00 — There is no bad weather, only bad clothing. Stay dry in the worst conditions. These heavy duty Gore-Tex trousers feature matte nonreflective olive drab polyester shell 3-layer construction Gore-Tex lining. This hard shell is your first layer of defense against the elements. Adjustable elastic suspenders and velcro waist band. One rear zipper pocket. Two front pass-through openings (NOT pockets). Zipper from the knee down, so you can put them on without taking off your boots. These go over your p...

item.title: Flight Suit
item.description: $200.00 — Super comfy expensive Japanese cotton polyester blend. Perfect for those long haul flights or sprinting up the steps of the Philadelphia Museum of Art in preparation to defeat the current world champion Apollo Creed. Two zipper pockets and two blank name tags.Made in CambodiaMaterial: 88% cotton, 12% polyesterS/N: 2021.141Nike # DC 5708Sofia is 5’7” and is wearing a Size XS All sales are final. Signature required upon delivery.

item.title: Universal Athletic Shirt
item.description: $60.00 — Classic Nike Dri-FIT cut. Lightweight. Makes you look like a superhero. High performance, moisture wicking. Blank shoulder mounted name tag. Thumb hole.Made in CambodiaMaterial: 100% polyesterS/N: 2021.143Nike # DC 5670Gray is 5’7” and is wearing a Size SLawrence is 6’1” and is wearing a Size L All sales are final. Signature required upon delivery.

item.title: Universal Athletic Shorts
item.description: $70.00 — These shorts are shorter than average men's shorts. Two very deep side zip pockets. One with an internal elastic compartment for a cell phone. Blank name tag. Polyester and spandex. Laminated knot tying card with 2 meters of red and white nylon 550 paracord to practice your knots. Learn the bowline, the “king of knots”.Made in VietnamMaterial: 84% polyester, 16% elastaneS/N: 2021.144Nike # DC 5705Sofia is 5’7” and is wearing a Size XSLawrence is 6’1” and is wearing a Size L All sales are final. ...

item.title: Ten Bullets T-Shirt (White)
item.description: $35.00 — Made in CambodiaMaterial: 100% heavy-weight cotton, embroidered polyester patchS/N: 2021.174Nike # DC 8445Tom is 5’6” and is wearing a Size M. All sales are final. Signature required upon delivery.

item.title: ISRU Hat
item.description: $65.00 — Made in the U.S.A under the strict supervision of the Western Hydrodynamic Research Institute. Shock Cord Bungee closure: constructed out of nylon cased, multi-stranded rubber core and secured by brass grommets to prevent pull outs. Embroidered logo. U.S. Patent No. D923,920 Material: 60% Cotton 40% PolyesterS/N: 2026.021 All sales are final. Signature required upon delivery.

item.title: Ten Bullets T-Shirt (Dark Gray)
item.description: $35.00 — Made in CambodiaMaterial: 100% heavy-weight cotton, embroidered polyester patchS/N: 2021.174Nike # DC 8445 All sales are final. Signature required upon delivery.

item.title: ISRU Sticker (Large)
item.description: $10.00 — Easy to peel vinyl. Dimensions 8″ × 2.97″S/N: 2026.022
